---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in OWS
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

Describe the problem and the expected behavior.

## Reproduction

Include the smallest safe project, commands, and environment details. Remove
credentials, private files, and unrelated personal data.

## Validation

- [ ] dotnet build OWS.sln -nologo
- [ ] dotnet test OWS.sln -nologo
